title: dombeya lucida
intro: Dombeya lucida, a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae, is commonly known as the 'Clearing Tree' or 'Dombeya Tree' due to its clear sap. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Dombeya lucida include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as acne and eczema, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its leaves, bark, and roots are used to create medicinal remedies.
